name: Cobb Salad Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 piece flat peasant bread or one large flour tortilla
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the bread or tortilla flat.
2. Arrange the grilled chicken on one side of the bread.
3. Place the bacon on top of the chicken.
4. Add the diced tomato and sliced avocado to the other side of the bread.
5. Scatter the chopped romaine lettuce and chopped iceberg lettuce over the ingredients.
6. Thinly slice the red onion and add them to the salad.
7. Drizzle the blue-cheese dressing evenly over the mixture.
8. Fold the sides of the bread or tortilla over the ingredients, rolling tightly.
9. Slice the sandwich diagonally into two pieces.
Makes one large sandwich.
